description: Classic and comfortable, the nike Elite shoe is a fabulous re-creation of its 1977 predecessor.UpperMesh upper for absolute lightweight comfort and breathabilityLeather overlays for added shoe structure and durabilityWell padded tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfortLacing system for a snug, customised Fitnike swoosh logos on the sides for midfoot support and styleMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight comfort and smooth, impact-free ridePadded tongue for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a classic waffle pattern tread for maximum traction and durabilityShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
